name: OpenClaw X Plugin
description: OpenClaw plugin for X/Twitter with OAuth account connection, authenticated reads (including followers), durable drafts, approval-gated publish, and local session/draft persistence.

setup.summary: Requires your own X developer app credentials. Stores OAuth session state and drafts on the local machine.
steps: Set X clientId and redirectUri, plus clientSecret for OAuth token exchange.
Use stable local state paths for sessionFilePath and draftsFilePath, outside the plugin install directory.
Connect the account with x_account_auth_url and x_account_complete before using authenticated reads or publish tools.
Follower-list reads require the OAuth scope follows.read; older sessions must reconnect after upgrading.

providers.name: X / Twitter API
providers.notes: OAuth tokens are persisted only to the configured local sessionFilePath; drafts are persisted only to draftsFilePath.

draftsFilePath.label: Draft store path
draftsFilePath.description: Stable local JSON file where draft records are stored. Keep this outside the plugin install directory.

sessionFilePath.label: Session store path
sessionFilePath.description: Stable local JSON file where OAuth session tokens are stored. Keep this outside the plugin install directory.

clientId.description: X app client ID used for OAuth.

clientSecret.description: X app client secret used for OAuth token exchange.

redirectUri.description: OAuth redirect URI registered with the X app.

bearerToken.description: Optional bearer token for read-oriented fallback paths when the target endpoint supports app auth.

accessToken.description: Optional user access token if supplying tokens manually instead of OAuth connect.

refreshToken.description: Optional user refresh token for persisted OAuth sessions.

draftsFilePath.description: Stable local path for persisted draft records.

sessionFilePath.description: Stable local path for persisted OAuth session state and tokens.
